DESCRIPTION: Catalysts are not consumed during #ySynthesis and return to your hand on completion.
The number of cards required to finish #ySynthesis.
Begin converting this card. Until its #yValency is full, cards played are removed from combat and confer their #yElements towards #ySynthesis. The newly created card is then added to your hand.
A #ySpectrumized card is removed from combat and is replaced with #yNeutralizers matching its #yElements.
Neutralizers are 0 cost cards which do not consume #yValency during #ySynthesis.
Deals #b3 additional damage per [Professor:FireIcon] . NL Enemies lose #b2 additional HP per [Professor:BoltIcon] .
Burning creatures take damage at the start of their turn.
Deals #b2 additional damage per [Professor:FireIcon] . NL Enemy loses #b1 additional #yStrength this turn per [Professor:IceIcon] .
Your next #yBlock gaining card gains additional #yBlock.

Costs #b1 less for each [Professor:FireIcon] [Professor:FireIcon] , NL [Professor:IceIcon] [Professor:IceIcon] , [Professor:BoltIcon] [Professor:BoltIcon] , and [Professor:WindIcon] [Professor:WindIcon] pair.
